# seerr_sonarr_quality_profile (Data Source)

Look up a Sonarr quality profile by name via /api/v3/qualityprofile.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_sonarr_quality_profile" "shows" {
  url     = var.sonarr_url
  api_key = var.sonarr_api_key
  name    = "HD-1080p"
}

output "sonarr_quality_profile_id" {
  value = data.seerr_sonarr_quality_profile.shows.quality_profile_id
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Sonarr API key used to read quality profiles.
- `name` (String) The Sonarr quality profile name to match exactly.

### Optional

- `base_url` (String) Base path when Sonarr is served under a subpath.
- `hostname` (String) Sonarr hostname when url is not provided.
- `port` (Number) Sonarr port when url is not provided.
- `url` (String) Full Sonarr URL. If set, it takes precedence over hostname, port, use_ssl, and base_url.
- `use_ssl` (Boolean) Use HTTPS when url is not provided.

### Read-Only

- `quality_profile_id` (Number) The numeric quality profile ID matching name.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON for the matched quality profile.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code for the quality profile lookup.
